name: smart-factory-worker-app
description: Production-ready mobile PWA for smart factory workers (Taiwan)

scripts.setup: npm ci && npm run db:migrate && npm run seed
scripts.dev: npm run dev -w apps/api & npm run dev -w apps/mobile
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/mobile
scripts.test: npm test -w apps/api && npm test -w apps/mobile
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/mobile
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/mobile

author: qhero70
